Tiger Ledgers

Strategic Financial Leadership for Growing Businesses

Fractional CFO expertise and full-service accounting under one roof.

Schedule a ConsultationExplore Services

What we do

Our Services

A complete finance function — accounting, payroll, tax, systems, and CFO leadership — delivered as one cohesive service.

Accounting

General accounting services and financial reporting.

Payroll & Expenses

Management of employee payments and business expense tracking.

Tax Filing

Professional tax preparation and submission.

Accounting Software Implementation

Setting up and migrating financial systems.

Fractional CFO

High-level strategic financial leadership on a part-time basis.

Industries

Who We Serve

We partner with founders and operators across these key segments.

Small Business

Tailored financial support for local and growing businesses.

eCommerce

Specific solutions for online retailers and digital marketplaces.

Freelancers & Contractors

Simplified accounting for solo professionals and 1099 workers.

SaaS & Software Startups

Specialized metrics and scaling support for tech companies.

Collaborate

Partnership Services

Trusted collaboration models for firms and platforms that need a finance back-office.

CPA Outsourcing

Partnering with Certified Public Accountants for back-office support.

Data Migration & Software Implementation

Collaborative tech transitions across financial platforms.

AI Enablement

Integrating artificial intelligence into financial workflows.

Our team

About Us

A small, senior team of finance and technology leaders dedicated to your success.

G

Girish Bendodker

Co-Founder

Seasoned finance leader bringing decades of experience in accounting, controllership, and strategic CFO advisory to growing businesses.

Operations and technology specialist focused on modern accounting systems, automation, and AI-enabled financial workflows.
